subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto the Lord of creation, and peace and blessings rest upon Him after Whom there shall be no Prophet, and upon His kindred and companions [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لمالک البریه و الصلوه و السلام علی من لا نبی بعده و علی آله و اصحابه
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for assistance; intercession
